name: ShopEase Cloud Demo
description: React Native e-commerce demo with CLIP search — API on Railway

ios.note: Simulator build for Appetize; device IPA requires Apple signing (TestFlight / BS)

llmKeys.userEntersInApp: Voice Search card → paste OpenAI/OpenRouter key (session memory only)

appetize.runsOn: GitHub Actions (push main / manual) or developer machine locally

githubIntegration.secretsSource: GitHub Actions secrets only — never src/.env in CI
githubIntegration.note: Push to main (or workflow_dispatch) builds APK + iOS sim zip and uploads to Appetize. LLM keys never in CI.

publicKeys._comment: Stable demo URLs — not secret. iOS key added after first manual CI upload with include_ios.
